data.content: Shipment review complete. Implementation commit 2d8cbbeaa9157db4f6e573e9542609cb64d5309a merged to origin/main via df98e88d (Merge worktree-foolery-da13-handoff-capsules). Quality gates passed: lint, tsc --noEmit (exit 0), bun run test (278 files, 2804 tests passing), bun run build. Acceptance criteria met: HandoffCapsulesPanel renders in beat detail lightbox sidebar using shared renderedHandoffCapsules/capsuleMeta helpers; collapses when empty; no regressions in beats without capsules.
